updateNote: Day 56 12:07 PM PT refresh: Brent pulls back to $104.63 (+31.0% from pre-war $79.84) from intraday $106.80 on Witkoff/Kushner Saturday Pakistan talks. WTI $93.90 (+24.4% from $75.51, -2% session). Gas $4.05 AAA (-6¢ WoW). TOULINE AIRSTRIKE: Israeli warplanes kill 2 in Touline, south Lebanon within hours of Trump's 3-week ceasefire extension — UN warns attacks may breach international humanitarian law. Hegseth: Iran war 'a gift to the world' — tells Europe 'you need Hormuz more than we do.' Pope Leo: 'As a pastor, I cannot support' US-Israeli war. EU's Kallas: nuclear experts must join talks or deal will be 'weaker than JCPOA.' UK Starmer pledges IRGC terror proscription by July 2026. White House confirms Witkoff/Kushner travel to Islamabad Saturday. Araghchi arrives Islamabad Friday night; continues to Moscow and Muscat. Lebanon 2,491 killed (+33 since yesterday).
dataFreshnessWarning: Data updated as of 12:07 PM PDT April 24, 2026 (Day 56). Ceasefire EXTENDED INDEFINITELY (Iran) + 3 WEEKS (Lebanon) but violations continue — 2 killed Touline. Brent $104.63 (+31.0%). WTI $93.90 (+24.4%). Gas $4.05 AAA. Witkoff/Kushner to Pakistan Saturday. Hegseth: war 'gift to world.' Pope Leo cannot support war. Kallas warns of 'more dangerous Iran.' Starmer: IRGC terror proscription by July. CENTCOM blockade Day 12. Hormuz Day 53 closed.
